brief: Fifth death in NYC Legionnaires' outbreak traced to cooling towers; Europe's heatwave causes €2bn in grain losses; Trump threatens Iran infrastructure; NYC mayor calls Netanyahu war criminal; Google commits $40M to AI for science; and more.
news_summary: New York's Legionnaires' outbreak has killed five, sourced to cooling towers. Europe's June heatwave caused €2bn in crop damage. Trump threatens Iranian bridges and power plants, while NYC's Mamdani calls Netanyahu a war criminal.

en.brief: Fifth death in NYC Legionnaires' outbreak traced to cooling towers; Europe's heatwave causes €2bn in grain losses; Trump threatens Iran infrastructure; NYC mayor calls Netanyahu war criminal; Google commits $40M to AI for science; and more.
en.news_summary: New York's Legionnaires' outbreak has killed five, sourced to cooling towers. Europe's June heatwave caused €2bn in crop damage. Trump threatens Iranian bridges and power plants, while NYC's Mamdani calls Netanyahu a war criminal.

zh.brief: 今日重點包括日本辦公室服裝性別爭議、金門與廈門機場的情感連結、烏克蘭軍方高層變動，以及特朗普法律糾紛。
zh.news_summary: 日本「Cool Biz」政策鼓勵男性穿短褲，引發女性對「腿毛騷擾」的不滿；金門居民對翔安機場的「情感工程」看法分歧；澤連斯基在抗議聲中撤換軍方總司令；特朗普在誹謗案中被迫交出紀錄。

todays_image.caption: Both Eryngium yuccifolium and Legionella bacteria thrive in moist environments—the plant in wet prairies and the bacteria in water systems—yet one was used as a traditional remedy while the other now spreads a deadly outbreak.
todays_image.title: Eryngium yuccifolium Michx.
